scripts.mobile:sync: npm run build && cd apps/mobile && npx cap sync
scripts.mobile:run:android: npm run build && cd apps/mobile && npx cap sync android && npx cap run android
scripts.mobile:run:ios: npm run build && cd apps/mobile && npx cap sync ios && npx cap run ios
scripts.mobile:open:android: cd apps/mobile && npx cap open android
scripts.mobile:open:ios: cd apps/mobile && npx cap open ios
scripts.desktop:build: npm run build && cd apps/desktop && npm run build
scripts.desktop:package:linux: npm run build && cd apps/desktop && npm run package:linux
